properties.gjj_ltx23_config: {"ltx_model_name":"ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1_transformer_only_fp8_scaled.safetensors","positive_prompt":"10s video, boy on left, girl on right, first 4 seconds left boy speak: 今天天气正好，later 6 seconds right girl speak: 是的，确实是这样，mouth movement strictly follow audio, audio‑video sync, slow pause between two sentences, male voice for boy, female voice for girl","negative_prompt":"titles, subtitles, text, watermark, logo, blurry text, distorted text, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, motion blur, camera shake, background clutter, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, uncanny valley, mismatched lip sync, off-sync audio, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, AI artifacts","segment_seconds":5,"width":1280,"height":720,"fps":24,"seed":886032258892100,"denoise_strength":1,"transition_enabled":false,"transition_curve":"前置过渡","transition_early_tail_ratio":0.75,"transition_implicit_guide_count":2,"transition_implicit_guide_strength":0.55,"transition_early_tail_strength":0.75,"transition_final_guide_strength":1,"segmented_execution":true,"segment_save_preset":"video/GJJ_LTX多图分段","segment_video_format":"video/h264-mp4"}

widgets_values: 10s video, boy on left, girl on right, first 4 seconds left boy speak: 今天天气正好，later 6 seconds right girl speak: 是的，确实是这样，mouth movement strictly follow audio, audio‑video sync, slow pause between two sentences, male voice for boy, female voice for girl
